rationale_source: R11-B-1 Layer 1: canonical-map suppression when loan_app source diverges >30% from broker; F2.DH activates concurrently

requested_loan_amount.rationale: Broker correction $290k; loan_app $115k SUPPRESSED per R11-B-1 Layer 1 (60% discrepancy from broker, well above 30% threshold). F1.LA broker_correction sole authority.

discrepancyHold.rationale: 60% discrepancy → F2.DH ACTIVE per R11-B-1 + R10-F.

must_not_include.rationale: Suppressed loan_app value (R11-B-1 Layer 1) must NOT appear.
